title: Modular downhole apparatus
abstract: A modular downhole apparatus has a body (2) configured to receive tool elements (4,5) for performing a downhole operation. A docking arrangement is provided for coupling the tool elements (4,5) to the body (2). The docking arrangement comprises a catch arrangement for engaging a latch arrangement to couple the tool elements (4,5) to the body (2). A lock arrangement maintains the tool elements (4,5) on the body (2) and comprises one or more tapered lock member (6) which on engagement are energised to securely maintain the tool elements (4,5) on the body (2).
claims: Claims 1. A modular downhole apparatus comprising: a body configured to receive a tool element for performing a downhole operation; a docking arrangement for coupling the tool element to the body, the docking arrangement comprising a catch arrangement provided on at least one of the body and the tool element, the catch arrangement configured to engage a latch arrangement of the other of the body and the tool element to couple the tool element to the body; and a lock arrangement configured to maintain the tool element on the body, the lock arrangement comprising a tapered lock member which on engagement is energised to securely maintain the tool element on the body. 2. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the tapered lock member is configured to be insertable into the body to fit into a space between the tool element and the body to lock the tool element to the body. 3. The apparatus of claim 1 or 2, wherein the tapered lock member is configured to apply a force on the tool element which urges the tool element towards a locked position relative to the body. 4. The apparatus of claim 3, wherein the tapered lock member is configured to apply the force on the tool element which urges the tool element towards a locked position relative to the body by insertion of the tapered lock member. 5. The apparatus of any preceding claim, wherein the apparatus is configured so that the tapered lock member is biased to urge the tool element towards a locked position relative to the body. 6. The apparatus of claim 5, wherein the apparatus comprises or is operatively associated with one or more spring element, the spring element configured to bias the tapered lock member towards a locked position relative to the body 7. The apparatus of any preceding claim, wherein the lock member comprises a tapered lock bar. 8. The apparatus of any preceding claim, comprising a plurality of the lock members. 9. The apparatus of any preceding claim, wherein the apparatus is configurable to define: a hole opener; a drilling tool; a stabiliser; a multi-function tool. 10. The apparatus of any preceding claim, wherein the body is configured to function as a common hub configured to be dressed with one or more tool element of the same or different tool configuration, the docking arrangement and/or the lock arrangement being common for each tool configuration. 1 1. The apparatus of any preceding claim, wherein the tool element comprises a cutting element. 12. The apparatus of claim 1 1 , wherein the tool element comprise a roller cutter. 13. The apparatus of claim 11 or 12, wherein the tool element comprises a fixed cutter. 14. The apparatus of claim 13, wherein the tool element comprises a fixed drag cutter. 15. The apparatus of any preceding claim, wherein the tool element comprises a stabiliser element. 16. The apparatus of any preceding claim, comprising a plurality of the tool elements. 17. The apparatus of claim 16, wherein the apparatus comprises at least two tool elements of the same tool element type. 18. The apparatus of claim 16 or 17, wherein the apparatus comprises at least two tool elements of different tool element types. 19. The apparatus of any preceding claim, further comprising, or being operatively associated with, a pilot drill bit. 20. The apparatus of any preceding claim, comprising a slot. 21. The apparatus of claim 20, wherein the slot has a T-shaped cross section. 22. The apparatus of claim 20 or 21 , comprising a plurality of the slots. 23. The apparatus of claim 20, 21 or 22, wherein the catch arrangement is positioned within the slot. 24. The apparatus of claim 23, wherein the catch arrangement comprises a latch recess formed into at least one of: a base of the slot; and one or more sidewall of the slot. 25. The apparatus of claim 24, comprising a plurality of latch recesses. 26. The apparatus of any preceding claim, wherein the latch arrangement is formed on a base portion of the tool element. 27. The apparatus of any preceding claim, wherein the latch arrangement is configured as a latch block. 28. The apparatus of claim 27, wherein the latch arrangement comprises a plurality of latch blocks formed on the tool element. 29. The apparatus of any preceding claim, wherein the downhole apparatus is configured to form part of a downhole assembly. 30. The apparatus of any preceding claim, comprising, or configured for attachment to, a top sub. 31. The apparatus of claim 30, wherein the lock member is retained in the body the top sub. 32. The apparatus of any preceding claim, comprising means to secure the locking bar in position within the body. 33. The apparatus of claim 33, wherein the means to secure the locking bar in position within the body comprises a fastener, a cap, a screw, a bolt. 34. The apparatus of any preceding claim, wherein at least one fluid flow path is formed within the body. 35. A method of assembling a modular downhole apparatus, the method comprising: coupling a tool element of a modular downhole apparatus to a body of a downhole apparatus using a docking arrangement, the docking arrangement comprising a catch arrangement provided on at least one of the body and the tool element, the catch arrangement configured to engage a latch arrangement of the other of the body and the tool element to couple the tool element to the body; and inserting a lock member of a locking arrangement of the modular downhole apparatus into the body to securely the tool element in position, the lock member comprising a tapered lock member which on engagement is energised to securely maintain the tool element on the body. 36. The method of claim 35, comprising arranging a plurality of tool elements around the body. 37. The method of claim 36, wherein a plurality of the tool elements are of the same tool element type. 38. The method of claim 36, wherein a plurality of the tool elements are of a different tool element type. 39. The method of any one of claims 35 to 38, wherein the body comprises at least one slot configured to receive the tool element, wherein the method further comprises inserting the tool element into the slot. 40. The method of any one of claims 35 to 39, comprising inserting the locking member into the body to lock the tool element to the body. 41. The method of claim 40, wherein inserting the locking member into the body energises the tool element towards a locked position. 42. The method of any one of claims 35 to 40, comprising inserting a biasing member to energise the tool element towards a locked position. 43. The method of any one of claims 35 to 42, comprising securing the downhole apparatus to the top sub such that the locking member is secured in the body by the top sub. 44. A kit for a modular downhole apparatus, the kit comprising: a body configured to receive at least one tool element for performing a downhole operation; and at least one tool element, a docking arrangement for coupling the tool element to the body, the docking arrangement comprising a catch arrangement provided on at least one of the body and the tool element, the catch arrangement configured to engage a latch arrangement of the other of the body and the tool element to couple the tool element to the body; and a lock arrangement configured to maintain the tool element on the body, the lock arrangement comprising a tapered lock member which on engagement is energised to securely maintain the tool element on the body. 45. The kit of claim 44, comprising a plurality of the tool elements, the tool element secured to the body comprising a selected tool element or tool elements from the plurality of tool elements of the kit.
